rawContent:
Tweet by @BrianRoemmele (Brian Roemmele)
Author bio: we can only see what we think is possible...
Text: Boom!

It is INSANE!

At The Zero-Human Company we just integrated Insanely Fast Whisper into our fully autonomous AI agent stack… and it’s completely changing the game.

We’re now transcribing 150 minutes of audio in 98 seconds, fully local, zero cloud, zero API bills, with perfect speaker diarization and multilingual support.

Podcasts, customer calls, internal meetings, generated video/audio content, our AI agents instantly turn raw audio into structured, actionable data with zero human touch. No delays. No costs. No privacy leaks.

Overnight we will no transcribe about 1200 podcasts for distillation and signals. Our goal is 10,000.

Mr. @Grok is confident this will be “easily” reached.

And this is exactly what we built The Zero-Human Company for: a company run entirely by AI agents where tools like this let the swarm operate at lightspeed.

Lightning-fast local inference isn’t a nice-to-have anymore.  

It’s the new baseline for true zero-human operations.

Use it, installation, one line.

Massive respect & huge thanks to the team → https://t.co/keqoGyEHjD
